evidence: Live schema round-trip: examples/detectTheme.ts on Haiku with z.object({theme: z.enum(...), confidence: z.number()}) returned typed output {theme:"tech",confidence:0.98} in 10.6s, $0.20, traceId 33cbbf51. Schema embedded in prompt text (dropped --json-schema CLI flag because it injects an Anthropic Tool with strict input_schema.type requirement that broke; zod-to-json-schema produces $ref/definitions wrapper incompatible with tool format). Robustness via extractJson() parser pulls JSON from prose if model wraps. Unit tests: tests/autoFunction.test.ts adds 4 vi.mock-backed cases — text output, schema parse OK, schema violation throws ZodError + traces ok=false, claude -p is_error=true throws + traces ok=false. vitest 9/9 passing in 60ms. typecheck clean.

evidence: Live shadow run: examples/shadow-demo.ts executed withShadow(detectThemeAI, detectThemeKeywordShadow, {mode:"log-only"}) on GPU/Linux/AI input. AI returned {theme:"tech",confidence:0.98} traceId 3c77132d, keyword-shadow returned {theme:"tech",confidence:0.9} traceId ca44e19c, source="ai", diverged=false (equals on theme matched). JSONL paired ids verified: AI event has id 3c77132d, shadow-code event has meta.pairedAiTraceId=3c77132d. Unit tests in tests/shadow.test.ts: 3 cases — log-only returns AI output and flags divergence on mismatched code shadow, prefer-shadow swaps source/output to shadow, equals callback marks non-diverged when shapes match. vitest 9/9 passing.

Both tiers achieved 100% on this baseline set — meaningful matchRate deltas expected on harder/adversarial sets in G007 autoresearch loop.

evidence: npm run traces:query (src/cli/traces.ts + src/db.ts DuckDB :memory: + read_json_auto over traces/*.jsonl) produced grouped table: 12 events across 6 groups by fn+variant+tier — detectTheme cheap-ai n=6 avgLat 9.5s errors=1 (the early G003 --json-schema 400 error is captured, proving ok=false tracing works), detectTheme smart-ai n=3 avgLat 7.6s errors=0, detectTheme shadow-code n=1 11.3s, detectTheme shadow-eval n=1, smoke cheap-ai n=1 9.8s, smoke smart-ai n=1 7.9s. Fixed src/db.ts to read AUTOFN_TRACES_DIR per-call (was capturing at module load). DuckDB BigInt formatting (6n vs 6) is cosmetic; DuckDB returns COUNT as BigInt by default. Cross-story aggregation works end-to-end against real G002..G005 traces.
